description: Cut a dash with these shoes for the cosmopolitan male from woodland. Inspired by rugged Texas plains and cowboy lifestyle from a bygone era, these leather shoes pay homage to the Wild West. Wear it with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket.UpperHigh quality leather upper for protection, comfort and durabilityPull loop at the heel collarCentral lacing system High on the ankle for styleContrast stitch detailing for styleMidsoleUpper stitched to TPU midsole for durabilityOutsoleTerraced lugs on the TPR outsole with a stacked heelDeep grooves on the heel and forefootshoe careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
